rulings.Case Title: DIGITAL SIGNAGE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. SIGNS AMERICA, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination That Settlement Is In Good Faith And For Order Barring Indemnity And Contribution Claims
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 30, 2008 LINE 5. CROSS-DEFENDANT 3M COMPANY'S Motion For Determination That Settlement Is In Good Faith And For Order Barring Indemnity And Contribution Claims IS DENIED BECAUSE C.C.P. SECTION 877.6 IS NOT APPLICABLE. THE SETTLEMENT IS SUBJECT TO ANALYSIS UNDER FEDERAL MARITIME LAW. HUTCHINS V JUNEAU TANKER CORP. (1994) 28 CAL APP 4TH 493, 499. THE PRINCIPLE OBJECTIVE OF THE CONTRACT AT ISSUE IS FURTHERING MARITIME COMMERCE WITHIN THE MEANING OF NORFOLK S. RY. CO V KIRBY (2004) 543 U.S. 14, 23 AND SENTRY SELECT INS. CO. V ROYAL INS. CO. OF AMERICA (9TH CIRCUIT 2007) 481 F. 3D 1208, 1217-1218. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: FARHAD S MAHJOURI VS. PROVIDENT LIFE AND ACCIDENT INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, MAY 30, 2008 LINE 10. DEFENDANTS PROVIDENT LIFE AND ACCIDENT INSURANCE COMPANY AND UNUM GROUP'S (FKA UNUMPROVIDENT CORPORATION) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS OBJECTED TO THE SUMMARY OF SURGICAL LOGS AND THE FINANCIAL ANALYSIS THAT ARE EXHIBITS TO THE ARNOLD - GARRY DECLARATION. THE OBJECTION IS SUSTAINED. THE DECLARATION DOES NOT PROVIDE SUFFICIENT FACTS AS TO THE SOURCE OF THE DATA AND/OR THE PREPARATION OF THE EXHIBITS. DEFENDANT ALSO HAS NOT PROVIDED THE FOUNDATION TO ADMIT THE EXHIBITS UNDER EVIDENCE CODE SECTION 622, 623, 1220 OR 1221. AS A CONSEQUENCE, DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF, THE DECLARATIONS OF DR. MACGREGOR AND VANESSA HILL CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT ON THE ISSUE OF WHETHER PLAINTIFF WAS PERMANENTLY DISABLED. BECAUSE DEFENDANT RELIES ON THE SAME FACTS IN SEEKING SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, THAT MOTION IS DENIED FOR THE SAME REASONS. THE FULLER DECLARATION ALSO CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT ON THE HANDLING OF THE CLAIM. =(302/PJM/PB)
